items.title: US adds BYD to list of firms with alleged Chinese military ties
items.summary: The Pentagon list warns US firms of risks linked to working with flagged Chinese companies.

items.title: Kerala’s coconut shell products; GPS Renewables secures Rs 635 Cr
items.summary: The founder of Thenga Coco, Maria Kuriakose, has built a business that transforms coconut shells, which were once considered waste, into functional and decorative products.
